examples: Granny was astounded and a little piqued, I think, because it had all been arranged without her knowledge.
We hadn't seen Granny for half a year.
Her health got so bad that I moved in and live with her mom, my granny.
There's not a grandma, granny, or Meema(ph) in sight, not even a big mama.
At Majdac, the granny, Anica, sighs and tuts as she clears away the leftovers from a bounteous dinner.
